parameters.query:
WITH claimed AS (
  SELECT q.id
  FROM ocr_extraction_queue q
  WHERE q.extraction_completed_at IS NULL
    AND q.extraction_failed_at IS NULL
    AND q.attempts < 3
  ORDER BY q.created_at ASC
  LIMIT 10
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
UPDATE ocr_extraction_queue q
SET attempts = attempts + 1
FROM claimed
WHERE q.id = claimed.id
RETURNING q.id, q.cert_id, q.file_url, q.subcontractor_id, q.attempts;

UPDATE subcontractor_certificates
SET policy_number = $1::text,
    carrier_name = NULLIF($2, 'null')::text,
    expiration_date = $3::date,
    status = 'verified'
WHERE id = NULLIF($4, 'null')::uuid
RETURNING id;

UPDATE ocr_extraction_queue
SET extraction_completed_at = now(),
    cert_updated_at = now(),
    extracted_policy_number = $1::text,
    extracted_carrier_name = NULLIF($2, 'null')::text,
    extracted_expiration_date = $3::date,
    last_error = NULL
WHERE id = NULLIF($4, 'null')::uuid
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('06 · Code · Parse Claude Response').item.json.policy_number }},{{ $('06 · Code · Parse Claude Response').item.json.carrier_name }},{{ $('06 · Code · Parse Claude Response').item.json.expiration_date }},{{ $('02 · Postgres · Claim Pending').item.json.id }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE ocr_extraction_queue
SET extraction_failed_at = now(),
    last_error = $1::text
WHERE id = NULLIF($2, 'null')::uuid
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ ($('06 · Code · Parse Claude Response').item.json.error || 'OCR extraction failed').replace(/,/g, ';') }},{{ $('02 · Postgres · Claim Pending').item.json.id }}
